etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn, "phonetic") represents the idea of organizing or ordering, as suggested by combining äşĽ(äşĽ, "gather") with ĺ†Š(ĺ†Š, "book"), which leads to the interpretation of gathering books in an orderly manner.
